headline: No Rate Cuts Until 2027? Grab These High-Yielding Safe Dividend Kings Now
summary: Persistent inflation is likely to keep the Federal Reserve from cutting rates until well into 2027. Rising costs in services, housing, energy, and tariffs continue to keep inflation above the Fed’s 2% target, while the labor market remains strong enough to support wage pressures. Because of this, the Fed is expected to keep rates higher ... No Rate Cuts Until 2027? Grab These High-Yielding Safe Dividend Kings Now
